docs.title: Awesome WM Dotfiles
docs.text: **Highly configurable, dynamic window manager for X11 on Arch Linux**

docs.title: ✨ Features
docs.text:
• Custom Rofi: Themed power menu and launcher with Monokai theme
  • Train-Station Theme: Custom Lua theme for a unique aesthetic
  • Integrated Scripts: Screenshot and weather utilities
  • Comprehensive Keybinds: Full keyboard-driven workflow

docs.title: Press Mod4 + Ctrl + r or log out and back in

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: Make sure you have the following installed on Arch Linux: - awesome - rofi - python (for the weather script)

docs.title: Steps
docs.text: 1. Clone the repository into your .dotfiles directory: ```bash git clone https://codeberg.org/WgpArch/awesome.git ~/.dotfiles/awesome

docs.title: Keybinds
docs.text:
docs/keybinds.md Keybinds

The keybinds are defined in configs/awesome/rc.lua. Key Combo

Action Mod4 + Return Open Terminal Mod4 + Space Open Rofi Launcher Mod4 + Shift + Space Open Rofi Power Menu Mod4 + Shift + s Take Screenshot

docs.title: Rofi Menus
docs.text:
Rofi Menus

Instead of the default Awesome WM menu, this setup utilizes Rofi for a more modern look.

 Launcher Menu: Triggered via your keybind, runs rofi/screenshot.sh to display open windows and apps.
 Power Menu: A beautifully styled exit menu (rofi/powermenu.sh) with options for Shutdown, Reboot, Lock, and Logout.
 Weather Script: Integrates rofi/weather.py to fetch and display weather data.

docs.title: Look & Feel
docs.text:
Look & Feel

The visual style is driven by custom files to keep things minimal and unique.

Awesome Theme: Located in configs/awesome/train-station/theme.lua. This handles the window borders, tag colors, and background. Rofi Theme: Uses a custom Monokai color scheme located at configs/awesome/rofi/Monokai.rasi for a cohesive dark theme across menus.
